text:
First, note: Australia/Sydney is UTC+10 currently, but in 1751, time zones were not standardized. However, for historical consistency in such problems, we assume Sydney follows LMT (Local Mean Time) based on longitude 151°12′E.

Longitude 151°12′E = 151.2°E.
Time offset from UTC = 151.2° × (4 minutes/degree) = 604.8 minutes ahead of UTC = 10 hours 4 minutes 48 seconds ahead.

So Sydney LMT = UTC + 10:04:48.

12:00 AM Sydney LMT → subtract 10:04:48 from previous day.

12:00:00 − 10:04:48 = 11:55:12 PM on October 31, 1751 (UTC).

FINAL_ANSWER: October 31, 1751 23:55:12 UTC
